column1: TODAY | Expect partly cloudy skies with afternoon and evening scattered showers and storms. Tomorrow, we'll see widespread showers and storms associated with Tropical Depression 4. If you live in flood prone areas, use today to get ready for the potential of minor storm surge or fresh water flooding.
I have never heard so much about a tropical depression. What will they do when it’s a hurricane?
FYI, Honeymoon Island State Park closed for storm prep.
